parsed_review.summary: Independent read-only review of CP00-563 (RP18 AI Legal Workflows, P04 permission fixture slice, descriptor-only, risk A, 10 units RP18.P04.M05.S15-RP18.P04.M06.S02) found no blocking issues. Pack binding (registry.js:205), no-write attestation (registry.js:1225), requirements (registry.js:1231), service descriptor/case-set (service.js:1601,1634), validators incl. coverage/slice/Hermes/Claude/closeout packets (validators.js:2296-2441), contract projection (contracts/ai-legal-workflows-core-contract.json:16,14139), tests (test/model.test.js:852-901), validation script (scripts/validate-rp18-ai-legal-workflows-core-contract.mjs:695-726), manifest, README (#cp00-563), and command-evidence are mutually consistent. Deliverable distribution (implementation 4, fixture 1, test 1, hermes_evidence 1, claude_review 1, ui 2 = 10) and micro-title split (Permission And Audit Binding 8, Synthetic Fixture Set 2) match across all layers. The pack-level production_ready claim is honestly FALSE (manifest production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false, implementation_layer:descriptor); production_ready_flag is a descriptor-verification token and the descriptor exposes only production_ready_candidate (descriptor coverage validity), so no production_ready gate is weakened. No-write/no-real-data boundaries are attested across all layers (freezeCp563Result service.js:1553 sets writes_*/dispatches_*_runtime/exposes_* false, no_real_data true, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt false); grep of package src found no fs/child_process/network/db operations, only attestation flags. Claude remains a read-only reviewer (Read/Grep/Glob) and is explicitly not final approver (claude_is_final_approval false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval false), with human final approval required for runtime opening (deferred to CP00-564) and enterprise trust closed outside this receipt. Hermes is used only for descriptor-only evidence packet/receipt shapes (H18), not product runtime. Review-hardening rejection list (forbidden_review_evidence registry.js:518) covers failed authentication, zero-byte stdout, malformed JSON, fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, disabled tools, missing raw-output/source-inspection refs, and final-approval/source-mutation/enterprise-trust claims; readiness auth preflight passed with valid non-zero (1228-byte) JSON. All 7 required public exports exist and surface via index.js export *. CP00-563 is correctly the live plan cursor head (closeout-pack-plan.json first_planned_pack_id CP00-563). Prior CP00-562 descriptor (contract:13524) and historical_pack_bindings (contract:14476, last entry CP00-563) are preserved with no regression. All implementation and plan validation gates passed (exit 0); closeout-pack:validate and other post-review-gated commands are appropriately deferred. Untracked progress-control-room and workbook files are correctly classified as unrelated out-of-scope dirty files per changed-file-scope.json. Post-review evidence artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are expectedly not yet present at this review stage per the hardened_review_sequence.
